subject: Support execution control of SDC Workflow init
commit_message:
Support execution control of SDC Workflow init

Added a flag to decide whether init job is needed.

Change-Id: Ib40571048dac1d1161d756edc5d738b86aac1c7a
Issue-ID: OOM-1712
Signed-off-by: priyanshua <pagarwal@amdocs.com>

Patch Set 2: Code-Review+1

This worked in our local full SDC charts deployment. I tested with default values, with custom values where the flag was once false, then changed to true and upgraded the deploy.
